## Checklist
<!-- Mark completed items with an "x" -->

### Code Quality
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

### Security
- [ ] I have not exposed any secrets or sensitive information
- [ ] I have validated all inputs
- [ ] I have implemented proper error handling
- [ ] I have reviewed the code for security vulnerabilities

### Database (if applicable)
- [ ] I have created necessary migrations
- [ ] Migrations are reversible
- [ ] I have updated seed data if needed
- [ ] Database indexes are properly configured

### Performance
- [ ] I have considered the performance impact of my changes
- [ ] I have added appropriate caching where necessary
- [ ] Database queries are optimized
- [ ] No N+1 query problems introduced

**PR Review Guidelines:**
- Code changes should be reviewed within 24 hours
- At least one approval required before merging
- All CI checks must pass
- No merge conflicts
- Follow semantic commit message format
